Subscription.title: Subscription
Subscription.description: A scheduled search task for academic conferences.

userId.description: The UID of the user who created the subscription.

name.description: The name of the subscription task.

startDate.description: The start date for the search range.

endDate.description: The end date for the search range.

emails.description: List of email addresses to send the results to.

frequency.description: How often the search should run.

sendTime.description: The time of day to send the email.

isActive.description: Whether the subscription is currently active.

lastRun.description: When the subscription was last executed.

/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}.description: Stores user subscription tasks for automated conference searches.
